title: terminalia supranitifolia
intro: Terminalia supranitifolia, also known as the Supan Nut or Terminalia Supan, is a type of deciduous tree native to tropical India. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Terminalia supranitifolia include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. The herbal preparations of Terminalia supranitifolia can be found in various forms, including decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and supplements.
